title: Dashboard Crash Fix
description: Dashboard crashes when loading datasets with over 10,000 rows due to a null pointer exception in the chart rendering module. Root cause was an uninitialized data source object under heavy load. Applied a null guard and added fallback empty state rendering. Unit and integration tests added to cover edge cases with large and empty datasets.

title: CSV Export Functionality
description: Implement CSV export for all report tables. Users can now click an 'Export' button on any table widget to download the current filtered/sorted view as a UTF-8 CSV file. Handles large exports efficiently with streaming and includes column headers. Added export format options in user preferences (delimiter, date format).

title: Dependency Security Update
description: Update vulnerable npm dependencies identified by the automated security scan. Patched lodash (CVE-2025-1234) and express (CVE-2025-5678) to their latest safe versions. Ran full regression suite to ensure no breaking changes. Update applies to the maintenance branch v2.4.x only.
